calendar.matters:
Declaration Of Michael Heath In Support Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Decision Of The Division Of Labor Standards Enforcement Office Of The State Labor Commissioner Re Violation Of Labor Code
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances despite the Court's tentative ruling of hearing required. The case is called at 9:30 am and at 9:45 am. There being no appearances, the Court rules as follws:

PETITIONER HALESI MAHADEV, LLC, LAXMAN ADHIKARI's Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Decision Of The Division Of Labor Standards Enforcement Office Of The State Labor Commissioner Re Violation Of Labor Code.

Off-calendar, no appearance by either side.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)

Declaration Of Michael Heath In Support Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Decision Of The Division Of Labor Standards Enforcement Office Of The State Labor Commissioner Re Violation Of Labor Code
Off Calendar May-14-2020 Continued To Aug-28-20 At 09:31 A.M. In Dept 302

MOTION - Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Decision Of The Division Of Labor Standards Enforcement Office Of The State Labor Commissioner Re Violation Of Labor Code 226 226 3
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

PETITIONER HALESI MAHADEV, LLC, LAXMAN ADHIKARI's Petition For Writ Of Mandate From The Decision Of The Division Of Labor Standards Enforcement Office Of The State Labor Commissioner Re Violation Of Labor Code 226 226 3 is Off calendar.

The court notes that the Heath Declaration filed December 12, 2019 is missing the referenced exhibits, that petitioner has not lodged the administrative record, and that it filed two different proofs of service. Petitioner must properly serve and notice the petition for hearing based on a complete record.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
